heading: Disposition of money, property, and wages by consular officers
label: 10705 Disposition of money, property, and wages by consular officers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1070546:624Section 10705 instructs consular officers on the disposal of the property and wages of deceased seamen who have died outside the United States.

children.text: sell the property and remit the proceeds and other money or wages of the seaman the officer has received, to the district court of the United States for the district in which the voyage begins or ends; or
deliver the money, property, and wages to the district court.
